name: C2 Attack
description: C2 Attack is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Hendersonville, TN. There are 5 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Reservations are available. Amenities include lights, trainers or lessons, restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility.
fees: Fee required — $10 walk-in charge (cash or Venmo) or memberships starting at $35/m. Membership includes door code for 24/7 access depending on current usage!

name: Gallatin Municipal Park
description: Come play pickleball at Gallatin Municipal Park in Gallatin, TN! There are 10 outdoor concrete and asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and lights. The courts are free.

name: NorthField Church Court
description: In the back of the church parking lot, to the right of the big playground.

name: Pickleball Kingdom - Hendersonville
description: Pickleball Kingdom - Hendersonville is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Hendersonville, TN. There are 12 indoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to food, restrooms, water, youth programming, lights, a pro shop or equipment store, trainers or lessons, wheelchair accessibility, and adaptive programming. You can reserve the courts.
fees: Fee required — Membership or drop in fee

name: Pickleball Kingdom Nashville North-Hendersonville
description: Our facility offers daily open play, private court reservations, free pickleball 101 classes, clinics, lessons, leagues, tournaments and socials.  Multiple community rooms for party's, corporate events and gatherings.   Pro shop, ball machine rental and a great community!

name: White House Municipal Park
description: Come play pickleball at White House Municipal Park in White House, TN! There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. You’ll have to create your own lines, but portable nets are available. The courts are free. Players have access to lights.

name: White House Recreation Center
description: White House Recreation Center is a place to play pickleball in White House, TN. There are 2 indoor acrylic courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like food, locker rooms, restrooms, water, wheelchair accessibility, lights, trainers or lessons, and youth programming. A membership is required to play.
